channel.title: Untagged on MWBlog
channel.description: Recent content in Untagged on MWBlog

item.title: Over the wire - Natas
item.description: Natas 0 Lately I finished the Over the wire - Bandit wargame. It teaches Unix/ Linux basics and although I dont think of myself as a beginner in the Linux world. I still taught me a few things about the Linux system and the basics of the shell. That inspired me to play another wargame - Natas. Natas is about another topic of interest to me - web security. I will document my journey through this wargame.
